response.justification: Candidate has roughly 13-14 years of solid full-stack and polyglot engineering experience with some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but falls well short of the Director-level IC bar this role requires: no demonstrated AI/ML expertise at depth, no recognized AI products or platforms, no advanced degree, and no evidence of the strategic advisory or cross-org influence expected of a Principal Engineer driving AI strategy.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Some recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
Track record of community teaching, talks, and OSS founding
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI platforms
Seniority below Director-level IC; no principal-scope strategic work
No advanced degree and no cloud architecture leadership evidence
